how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Roorkee JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the IIT Roorkee JRF recruitment is 15 July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M. Tech. degree with GATE qualification in relevant fields or an M.Sc. degree with GATE or NET qualification in Chemistry, Polymer Chemistry, Industrial Chemistry, Materials Chemistry, or allied fields.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the JRF position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 37,000 per month, plus HRA as applicable.

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for the JRF post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the JRF post will primarily involve an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q7. Which organization is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by the Indian Institute of Technology Roorkee (IIT Roorkee).

faq.question: Q8. How many vacancies are available for the JRF post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for this position is contractual.

faq.question: Q10. Where is IIT Roorkee located?
faq.answer: IIT Roorkee is located in Roorkee, Uttarakhand. The specific city mentioned for this recruitment is Saharanpur.
